svg.title: LLM prompting systems progression
svg.desc: A diagram showing how LLM prompting techniques build on each other, from foundational concepts through single-prompt techniques to workflow-level patterns.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain what a large language model is in simple terms')
sendPrompt('Explain what LLM prompting is and why it matters')
sendPrompt('Explain how a general LLM is trained')
sendPrompt('Explain the difference between system and user prompts in API-based LLMs')
sendPrompt('Give me an example of role-based prompting')
sendPrompt('Give me a Chain of Thought example')
sendPrompt('Walk me through a ReAct loop example')
sendPrompt('Explain prompt instruction refinement with an example')
g.text: Meta-skill that improves every technique above

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Give me an example of prompt chaining')
sendPrompt('Show me a gate check example with Pydantic')
sendPrompt('Walk me through an LLM feedback loop example')
